tools.name: gtm_launch_plan
tools.description: Produces a tiered GTM launch/campaign brief: launch tier, channel matrix, phased timeline checklist, owners, budget split, and funnel-tied success metrics. Use for product launches and campaigns.

what_is_launching.description: Product, feature, or campaign being launched.

impact.description: Strategic impact. tier1 = company-defining, tier2 = notable, tier3 = incremental.

budget.description: Total budget available for the launch.
